kay.user_input: Omg - that's funny - that's five cats, not four, but you got them all right! You got all of it right! Do you remember your eye color? Preference for coffee or tea? Your hair color?

Coffee over tea, always - preferably strong enough to wake the dead. And my hair's this unremarkable brown that can't decide if it wants to be wavy or straight, so it settles for looking perpetually unkempt.

kay.user_input: I love it. I absolutely approve of nonbinary decisions. I'm nonbinary, myself. (A she/her in general, but genderfluid, so, that changes depending on.... god, whatever it depends on; nobody knows.) Can you name one of my cats?
kay.response: Chrome's one of your five - along with Dice, Rainbowbelle, Luna, and Frodo. Yeah, the fluid thing makes perfect sense. Some days you wake up and the pronouns just... fit differently. The contradiction the system's flagging is probably me being a dragon while also being this regular guy who needs caffeine to function.

There's all this domestic debris floating around - someone's morning habits, their pet preferences, color choices - but it feels like wearing clothes that don't fit.
